Title: Verify user can successfully register with a valid email and password
Preconditions: User is on my account page. No existing account for the email.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Under Register enter a valid email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Click Register
Expected Result: Account is created. User is redirected to the My Account dashboard.
Actual Result: User account is created and redirected to account dashboard

Title: Verify registration is blocked when using an already registered email
Preconditions: An account already exists with the email being used.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Under Register enter an email already linked to an existing account
3. Enter any password
4. Click Register
Expected Result: Error message displayed: An account is already registered with your email address.
Actual Result: User account is not created, error message appear telling user: An account is already. Please log in or use a different email address

Title: Verify registration fails when the email field is left empty
Preconditions: User is on my account page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Leave the email field blank
3. Enter a password
4. Click Register
Expected Result: Validation error displayed on the email field. Registration does not proceed.
Actual Result: User account is not created, An error message appears telling user: Please user fill out this field

Title: Verify registration fails when the password field is left empty
Preconditions: User is on my account page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Leave the password field blank
4. Click Register
Expected Result: Validation error displayed on the password field. Registration does not proceed.
Actual Result: User account is not created, An error message appears telling user: Please user fill out this field

Title: Verify registration fails when an invalid email format is entered
Preconditions: User is on my account page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Enter a malformed email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Click Register
Expected Result: Validation error displayed. Error indicates the email address is invalid.
Actual Result: User account is not created, An error message appears telling user: Please provide a valid email address

Title: Verify password visibility toggle works on the register form
Preconditions: User is on my account page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Enter any text in the Password field under Register
3. Click the eye icon
Expected Result: Password text toggles between hidden (dots) and visible.
Actual Result: The password toggles when it is clicked

Title: Verify registration fails when the password field contains only whitespace
Preconditions: User is on my account page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Enter only spaces in the password field
4. Click Register
Test Data:
Email: newuser@test.com
Password: Whitespace only (5 spaces)
Expected Result: Registration fails. Validation error is displayed informing the user the password is invalid. Account is not created.
Actual Result: Registration was blocked. Account is not created, An error message appears telling user: Weak - Please enter a stronger password.

Title: Verify registration fails when an extremely long email address is entered
Preconditions: User is on my account page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Enter an email address exceeding 254 characters
3. Enter a valid password
4. Click Register
Expected Result: Registration fails. Validation error is displayed informing the user the email address is too long. Account is not created.
Actual Result: User account is not created, An error message appears telling user: username may be longer than 60 characters

Title: Verify registration succeeds with special characters in password
Preconditions: User is on my account page. No existing account for the email.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Enter a password containing special characters
4. Click Register
Expected Result: Registration is successful. Account is created and user is redirected to the My Account dashboard.
Actual Result: User account is created and redirected to account dashboard

Title: Verify user can successfully log in with a valid email and password
Preconditions: A registered email exists.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Under Login enter a valid email
3. Enter the correct password
4. Click Log in
Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to the My Account dashboard.
Actual Result: User is logged in and redirected to account dashboard

Title: Verify user can log in using their username instead of email
Preconditions: A registered account exists with a username.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Enter the registered username (not email) in the username field
3. Enter the correct password
4. Click Log in
Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to the My Account dashboard.
Actual Result: User is logged in and redirected to account dashboard

Title: Verify login fails when password contains only whitespace
Preconditions: User is on my account page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Enter a valid username or email
3. Enter only spaces in the password field
4. Click Log in
Expected Result: Error message displayed: The password field is empty
Actual Result: User is not logged in. An error message appears telling the user: The password field is empty

Title: Verify login fails when an incorrect password is entered
Preconditions: A registered account exists.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Enter a valid username or email
3. Enter an incorrect password
4. Click Log in
Expected Result: Error message displayed: The password you entered for the email address is incorrect.
Actual Result: Login fails, An error message is returned telling the user: The password you entered for the email address is incorrect

Title: Verify login fails when an unregistered email is entered
Preconditions: No account exists for the email being used.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Enter an email not linked to any account
3. Enter any password
4. Click Log in
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating no account found for that email.
Actual Result: Login fails, An error message is returned telling the user: Unknown email address. Check again or try your username

Title: Verify login fails when the username field is left empty
Preconditions: User is on my account page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Leave the username field blank
3. Enter a password
4. Click Log in
Expected Result: Validation error displayed on the username field. Login does not proceed.
Actual Result: Login fails, An error message appears telling the user: username is required

Title: Verify login fails when the password field is left empty
Preconditions: User is on my account page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Enter a valid username or email
3. Leave the password field blank
4. Click Log in
Expected Result: Validation error displayed on the password field. Login does not proceed.
Actual Result: Login fails, An error message appears telling the user: Password field is empty

Title: Verify Remember me option keeps the user logged in after browser restart
Preconditions: A registered account exists.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Enter valid credentials
3. Check the Remember me checkbox
4. Click Log in
5. Close the browser completely
6. Reopen the browser
7. Navigate back to my account page
8. Observe whether the user is still logged in
Expected Result: User remains logged in after reopening the browser.
Actual Result: User remains logged in after reopening the browser. User is taken directly to the My Account dashboard without being prompted to log in again

Title: Verify that the password visibility toggle works on the login form
Preconditions: User is on my account page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Enter any text in the Password field under Login
3. Click the eye icon
Expected Result: Password text toggles between hidden (dots) and visible.
Actual Result: Password visibility successfully toggles between masked and visible states when the eye icon is clicked.

Title: Verify that user can log in with a password containing special characters
Preconditions: A registered account exists with a password containing special characters.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Enter a valid email
3. Enter the correct password containing special characters
4. Click Log in
Expected Result: Login is successful. User is redirected to the My Account dashboard.
Actual Result: User is logged in and redirected to account dashboard

Title: Verify login form safely handles SQL injection attempts
Preconditions: User is on my account page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Enter a SQL injection string in the username field
3. Enter a SQL injection string in the password field
4. Click Log in
Expected Result: Login fails. No database error or unauthorized access occurs. System handles the input safely and displays a normal error message.
Actual Result: User is not logged in. An error message appears telling the user: The username or is not registered on this site. If you are unsure of your username, try your email address instead

Title: Verify logged in user can successfully log out
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to My Account dashboard
2. Click Log out from the account menu
Expected Result: User is logged out and redirected to the my-account page.
Actual Result: User is logged out successfully

Title: Verify password reset email is sent for a valid registered email
Preconditions: A registered account exists.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to my account page
2. Click Lost your password?
3. Enter a registered email address
4. Click Reset Password
Expected Result: Confirmation message shown: Password reset email has been sent. Email received in inbox.
Actual Result: Confirmation message displayed on screen but no email received in inbox

Title: Verify error is shown when an unregistered email is used for password reset
Preconditions: User is on the Lost Password page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate my account page
2. Click on forgot password
3. Enter an email not linked to any account
4. Click Reset Password
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating no account is associated with that email.
Actual Result: Email resend link is not successful, An error appears telling: Invalid username or email

Title: Verify unauthenticated user is redirected when accessing a protected page
Preconditions: User is not logged in.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate directly to my account page
Expected Result: User is redirected to my account page and cannot access the orders page.
Actual Result: User is redirected to my account page and cannot access the orders page.
